directions.createDescription: Each direction keeps its job database, ingestion rules, base resume, evidence, and stories separate from every other direction.
directions.namePlaceholder: For example: AI Agent Application Development
directions.onboardingDescription: Define the roles to look for, decide how to filter them, then prepare a base resume for this direction before you start collecting jobs.

1.title: Set role keywords and cities
1.description: Enter the roles you want to apply for and choose the cities to search. Both are required before collection.

2.title: Generate and confirm ingestion rules with LLM
2.description: After saving your target, open Ingestion Rules and choose Generate with LLM to review and save a draft for this direction.

3.title: Prepare a direction-specific base resume
3.description: Create from the template and add real experience. It is used only for this direction's scoring, materials, and interview prep.

crawlTour.title: Start your first crawl
crawlTour.body: Your configuration is saved. Start collecting jobs here; after sign-in succeeds and collection begins, we will take you to import or write the base resume for this direction.

scoringGuide.title: Your job database is ready for a scoring keyword library
scoringGuide.body: This direction has {{count}} jobs, but its scoring keyword library is empty. Let LLM derive suggestions from the database, then review and apply them.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: These settings apply to all of BossFlow and do not change with the job-search direction.

llm.title: LLM service
llm.description: Used for ingestion rules, scoring keywords, job evaluation, resumes, and interview materials. The API key stays in local system settings and is never stored in a job-search direction.
llm.configured: LLM is configured and ready to generate.
llm.notConfigured: LLM is not configured. Using any LLM feature will bring you here.
llm.apiKeyKeep: Configured; leave empty to keep the current key
llm.apiKeyHint: The key is masked by default; choose Show to view the current local key.
llm.testSuccess: API connection succeeded and the selected model is callable.

setupTour.title: API test succeeded
setupTour.body: The selected model is ready. Save these settings, then return to Ingestion Rules and generate the LLM draft.
setupTour.saveFailed: Could not save the settings. Check the configuration and try again.

cvGuide.title: Base resume cv.md
cvGuide.notLoaded: CV status has not been loaded
cvGuide.missingBody: Coarse scoring, LLM evaluation, tailored resumes, and interview prep all depend on cv.md. Create it from the template first, then fill in real experience.
cvGuide.readyBody: The core information needed for scoring and material generation was detected.
cvGuide.incompleteBody: You can continue, but missing fields will reduce scoring and material quality.

personalResume.title: Personal Resume
personalResume.subtitle: Maintain the base resume used for scoring and materials, and review job-tailored copies.
personalResume.tailoredSubtitle: Generated job versions. Edits only affect the selected copy.
personalResume.importHint: Imported content is loaded into the editor first and is written only after you save. PDF and Word extraction can lose structure; convert to text or Markdown before importing for now.
personalResume.editorPlaceholder: Add your real experience, skills, education, and projects here.
personalResume.noTailored: No tailored resumes yet. Generate one for a target job from Resume Materials.
personalResume.baseSaved: Base resume saved and completeness rechecked.
personalResume.templateCreated: cv.md was created from the template. Add your real details, then save.
personalResume.importReady: {{name}} is loaded. Review it, then save.
personalResume.importUnsupported: Only .md and .txt files are supported right now.
personalResume.unsavedSwitchConfirm: This resume has unsaved changes. Switching will discard them. Continue?

tour.importBody: Import an existing Markdown or text resume here. It enters the editor first and is saved only after you review it.
tour.editorBody: You can also add your real work, projects, skills, and education in the editor. This base resume belongs only to the current direction.
tour.saveBody: After saving, it supports later scoring, evidence work, tailored resumes, and interview preparation.

markdownEditor.emptyPreview: Start writing Markdown to preview the formatted resume here.

dashboardTasks.title: Today's Job Search Tasks
dashboardTasks.subtitle: Prioritized jobs, materials, and interview story gaps worth handling today.
dashboardTasks.evidenceTasksSubtitle: Each capability appears once, with affected jobs and required-item impact explained.
dashboardTasks.evidenceDefaultAction: Add or confirm professional evidence that can be reused across jobs.
dashboardTasks.todayJobsSubtitle: Quickly review new opportunities collected today.
dashboardTasks.recentJobsSubtitle: No new jobs today, so the latest updates are shown first.
dashboardTasks.noTodayJobs: No new jobs to show yet.
dashboardTasks.focusJobsSubtitle: High-scoring candidates from rule scoring or LLM evaluation.
dashboardTasks.waitingConfirmSubtitle: Items that need your judgment, material review, or story confirmation.
dashboardTasks.noWaitingConfirm: Nothing is waiting for confirmation right now.
dashboardTasks.storyGapsSubtitle: Story drafts extracted from interview prep that are not confirmed yet.
dashboardTasks.noStoryGaps: No story gaps waiting for confirmation.
dashboardTasks.unusedMaterialsSubtitle: Next steps for LLM reports, resume suggestions, drafts, or interview prep.
dashboardTasks.waitingReviewDetail: Evaluation is available and needs your decision before moving forward.
dashboardTasks.storyDraftDetail: Confirm this story draft before adding it to the story bank.
dashboardTasks.reportUnusedDetail: The LLM report is ready. Resume suggestions can be generated next.
dashboardTasks.suggestionUnusedDetail: Resume suggestions are ready. Select items and generate a tailored resume.
dashboardTasks.draftUnusedDetail: A tailored resume exists, but the candidate job is not ready to greet yet.
dashboardTasks.interviewPrepUnusedDetail: Interview prep is ready. Confirm the extracted story drafts next.
dashboardTasks.storyGapDetail: This story still needs STAR details and confirmation.

jobs.confirmUpdateAllLiveStatus: Run a low-frequency check for job pages in the whole database and skip jobs last seen closed by default. This is only a point-in-time observation, not realtime hiring status. Start now?

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.noMatch: No pipeline jobs match this filter.
pipeline.resumeHint: Generate JD-specific resume suggestions first. This will not change cv.md.
pipeline.interviewPrepHint: Generate role-specific interview prep from the LLM report, resume materials, and story bank.
pipeline.confirmDelete: Delete this pipeline item and its generated LLM report?

jobWorkspace.title: Job Workspace

nextActionReasons.llm: First decide whether this role is worth spending more time on.
nextActionReasons.evidence_assessment: This report has not produced structured core requirements yet. Re-evaluate it before judging evidence readiness.
nextActionReasons.evidence_gap: You have confirmed that at least one required experience is absent. Decide whether to proceed with that risk, prepare, or skip first.
nextActionReasons.evidence_review: Some core requirements still need an evidence decision. Confirm them before generating materials so inferred content is not treated as personal fact.
nextActionReasons.resume: The evaluation is ready, so the JD requirements can be turned into concrete resume edits.
nextActionReasons.draft: Resume suggestions exist. Open Resume Materials, review them, and generate the tailored resume next.
nextActionReasons.interview: Resume materials are ready, so interview questions and story material can be prepared next.
nextActionReasons.confirm: Materials are far enough along to decide whether to greet, interview, or skip.
nextActionReasons.review: There is no blocking material gap. Review the report or update the job status.

nextActions.llm: Generate an LLM evaluation first to decide whether this role is worth pursuing.
nextActions.resume: The evaluation is ready. Generate JD-specific resume suggestions next.
nextActions.draft: Resume suggestions are ready. Confirm them and generate a tailored resume next.
nextActions.interview: Resume materials are ready. Generate interview prep next.
nextActions.confirm: Materials are ready for your decision. Confirm whether to greet or skip.
nextActions.review: Core materials are ready. Review the report or update the job status.

evidence.requirementsSummary: This role has {{count}} core requirements, including {{required}} required items. Explicit resume facts are source-verified; inferred evidence only needs one confirmation.
evidence.notFoundStatement: No relevant evidence was found in current materials. This does not mean you lack this capability.
evidence.legacyReportHint: This evaluation predates structured evidence. Re-run it to extract core requirements here.
evidence.noAssessment: After an LLM evaluation, core requirements, current material clues, and confirmation items will appear here.
evidence.sourceVerifiedTitle: Explicit fact in your personal resume
evidence.sourceVerifiedNoConfirmation: Verified from your personal resume; no repeated confirmation needed
evidence.documentFactMissing: This structured fact was not found in your personal resume. Add or correct it there.
evidence.candidateDecision: Does this material prove the requirement?
evidence.confirmedOnce: This fact is confirmed once and will be reused for matching requirements in other jobs.
evidence.crossJobReuseHint: This evidence came from another job with the same requirement, with its original evidence link preserved.
evidence.confirmedAbsentStatement: You confirmed that you do not currently have experience matching this requirement. The system will not present it as an existing capability.
evidence.unsureStatement: You marked this requirement as uncertain. Choose whether to review, build evidence, or proceed with the risk based on your time budget.

decisionRationale.done: The user confirmed relevant experience and added a reviewable fact draft.
decisionRationale.adjacent: The user confirmed adjacent experience; full coverage still requires a transfer rationale.
decisionRationale.not_done: The user explicitly confirmed they have not done this.
decisionRationale.unsure: The user cannot currently confirm related experience.
decisionRationale.candidateConfirmed: The user confirmed that content in their materials proves this requirement.
decisionRationale.candidateRejected: The user confirmed that the candidate material does not apply to this requirement.
decisionRationale.preferenceMatches: The user confirmed the current condition matches this requirement.
decisionRationale.preferenceNegotiable: The user confirmed the current condition is negotiable.
decisionRationale.preferenceDoesNotMatch: The user confirmed the current condition does not match this requirement.

taskRecommendations.extract: Extract reviewable facts from existing experience
taskRecommendations.strengthen: Confirm and strengthen the role, actions, results, and source
taskRecommendations.translate: Document transferable parts and capability boundaries
taskRecommendations.learn: Complete short-term study or review within the selected time budget
taskRecommendations.project: Build new professional evidence through a real project or practice
taskRecommendations.accept_risk: Keep the gap visible and proceed with the role at risk
taskRecommendations.ignore: Ignore this requirement for now or stop pursuing the role

errors.saveItem: Could not save the evidence draft. Try again.
errors.classify: Could not save the evidence assessment. Try again.
errors.saveTask: Could not save the action task. Try again.
errors.confirm: Could not confirm the fact. Try again.

dialog.factGuardrail: Only enter things you truly did or boundaries you can state clearly. AI suggestions, job gaps, and preparation questions cannot be saved as personal facts.
dialog.candidateReviewHint: This content was extracted from your materials. Review its accuracy without re-entering the full experience.
dialog.candidateEvidencePlaceholder: Relevant text extracted from your personal materials.
dialog.candidateConfirmHint: Confirmation creates globally confirmed evidence that can be reused by matching requirements in other jobs.
dialog.experiencePlaceholder: Describe a real project, task, or event rather than only naming a capability.
dialog.role: 2. What role did you personally play?
dialog.rolePlaceholder: Describe your responsibility boundary and individual contribution.
dialog.actionsPlaceholder: One item per line; include methods, technology, or key decisions.
dialog.results: 4. What result, metric, or artifact exists?
dialog.resultsPlaceholder: If there is no metric, explicitly say so and describe the real artifact or impact.
dialog.sourcePlaceholder: For example: a cv.md section, local project path, document name, or another reviewable reference.
dialog.adjacentExperiencePlaceholder: Describe real experience that is close to the target requirement.
dialog.transferablePlaceholder: Describe reusable methods, technology, business context, or collaboration patterns.
dialog.boundaries: What can you not claim yet?
dialog.boundariesPlaceholder: State the boundary clearly so adjacent experience is not presented as full coverage.
dialog.timeBudget: How much time will you invest in this search cycle?
dialog.willingnessLabel: Do you want to develop in this direction long term?
dialog.draftHint: Saving creates an evidence draft. You must explicitly confirm it before it becomes confirmed evidence.
dialog.decisionHint: The system records your choice; it will not automatically apply, study, or abandon the role for you.

actions.acceptRiskDesc: Keep the gap visible and continue evaluating or applying.
actions.learnDesc: Prepare knowledge within the chosen time without presenting it as project experience.
actions.projectDesc: Create verifiable professional evidence through real practice.
actions.ignoreDesc: Do not invest in this requirement and abandon the role if needed.

jobWorkspace.greetingPlaceholder: Greeting drafts and sent status will be added in a later phase.
jobWorkspace.greetingEmptyHint: Generate an LLM evaluation first. If the report contains a Boss greeting section, it will be extracted here automatically.
jobWorkspace.storyPlaceholder: Related stories, missing stories, and confirmation status will appear here later.

resume.title: Resume
resume.noResumeSuggestions: No resume suggestions yet. Generate suggestions from Pipeline first.
resume.selectionPolicy: Only Safe suggestions are selected by default. Needs confirmation and Avoid fabrication suggestions require your decision.
resume.selectionPolicyConfirmedEvidence: Every suggestion can be selected. Confirmed evidence enters the main resume; unconfirmed selections only appear as pending additions and are never written as established facts.
resume.noStructuredItems: No structured S-items detected. Tailored resume generation can still use the full suggestions.
resume.supplementOnly: Selected as a pending addition only
resume.draftEvidence: Confirmed evidence used in this draft
resume.noSuggestions: No suggestions found for this job.
resume.userNotesPlaceholder: Add facts you confirmed, projects to emphasize, or content to avoid...
resume.noDraftYet: No tailored resume yet. Select suggestions and generate a tailored resume Markdown.

tour.keywordsBody: Use one job title per line. A new direction starts with its name as the first keyword; add equivalent target titles as needed.
tour.citiesBody: Choose cities from the shortcuts to fill their codes automatically. Cities stay your decision, so the system never guesses where you want to work.
tour.saveBody: Save this configuration before crawling. When you need to filter incoming jobs, open Ingestion Rules to generate and confirm an LLM draft.
tour.saveFailed: Save failed. You are still on this page; check the configuration and try again.
tour.cityRequired: Choose at least one crawl city before continuing.

rules.title: Matching & Scoring Config
rules.subtitle: Ingestion matching affects cleaned job retention and categorization; the job scoring plan only runs when you click job scoring.
rules.matchingSubtitle: Configure post-crawl categorization, fallback retention terms, blacklist terms, and minimum salary.

tour.draftBody: LLM can draft rules from your crawl keywords. It is never saved automatically; review, apply, and confirm it yourself.
tour.categoryTitle: Classify by job and business direction
tour.categoryBody: Categories should describe job families, industries, or business domains—not technical dimensions such as languages or tools. You can also maintain everything manually.
tour.saveBody: Save after confirming the rules. You can then start your first crawl and prepare a base resume while it runs.
tour.saveFailed: Save failed. You have not moved to the next step; check the configuration and try again.
tour.generateRequired: Your ingestion rules are empty. Choose Generate with LLM above, wait for the draft, and review it before continuing.

rules.scoringSubtitle: Configure weights, thresholds, skill keywords, and risk caps used by manual job scoring.
rules.categoryRulesDesc: Jobs are categorized by category names and match terms during ingestion; fallback keywords are used only when no category matches.
rules.addKeywordPlaceholder: Type a term, then press Enter or add
rules.ifCategoryNotMatched: Keep uncategorized jobs only when titles include these terms
rules.discardIfTitleMatches: Discard jobs when titles include these terms
rules.minSalaryHint: Jobs below this threshold will be discarded during processing.
rules.scoringRulesDesc: Used when you click Score page / Score all / Score selected; does not affect ingestion.
rules.formulaDesc: Signals are normalized to 0-1, weighted, summed, then clamped to a 1-5 score.
rules.formulaCoverage: coverage: share of JD keywords covered by cv.md.
rules.formulaJdQuality: jdQuality: longer and richer JDs produce stronger signal.
rules.formulaSalary: salary: higher average salary produces stronger signal.
rules.formulaCaps: Risk caps: experience risk max {{exp}}; education risk max {{edu}}.
rules.scoringPresetsDesc: Start with a preset when unsure, then fine-tune. Built-in presets do not change salary thresholds.

balanced.title: Balanced Default
balanced.desc: A general setup balancing skills, experience, education, and salary.

strict.title: Strict Match
strict.desc: Prioritizes experience, education, and skill coverage for high-confidence jobs.

opportunity.title: Opportunity First
opportunity.desc: Reduces experience and education penalties for exploratory or transition roles.

salary.title: Salary First
salary.desc: Raises salary signal weight while keeping your high and medium salary lines.

rules.customPresetsDesc: Save the current scoring style and apply it later.
rules.customPresetNamePlaceholder: Preset name, e.g. My stable setup
rules.customPresetHint: Custom presets only save weights, thresholds, risk caps, and salary lines. Skill keywords always use the current job-search direction keyword library.
rules.noCustomPresets: No custom presets yet. Tune a setup, then save it for reuse.
rules.scoringParametersDesc: Expand to view the formula and tune weights, JD, salary, and risk caps.
rules.scoringWeightsDesc: Higher weights make a signal influence the 1-5 score more.
rules.jdQualityDesc: More complete job descriptions make coarse scores more reliable.
rules.salaryDesc: Adds a small boost for high or medium salary jobs.
rules.riskCapsDesc: Limit the maximum score when experience or education is clearly below requirement.
rules.scoringKeywordHintsDesc: Scoring extracts these terms from the JD and checks whether cv.md covers them.
rules.aiKeywordSuggestionsDesc: Sample the current job database and ask the LLM for skill keywords. Suggestions are shown for review before append or replace.
rules.matchingSuggestionHint: This draft uses only target job keywords and existing ingestion rules. It never uses a resume or city, and it does not change or save the current job-search direction automatically.
rules.matchingSuggestionSaveReminder: Apply only updates the current editor. Save Config is still required to persist it.

story.title: Story
story.rawNotePlaceholder: Capture the experience fragment, project reflection, or interview material first. It does not need to be STAR yet.
story.noDraftsYet: No story drafts yet. Create drafts from Interview prep, then confirm them here.
story.storyBankEmpty: Story bank is empty. Add freeform material first, then structure it into STAR/CAR/PAR later.
story.promotionRequirement: Add a title and either raw material or at least one structured field before promoting.

interview.title: Interview
interview.jobsWithMaterials: jobs with evaluation or resume materials
interview.noInterviewReady: No interview-ready jobs yet. Generate an LLM report or resume suggestions from Pipeline first.
interview.evidenceCitationHint: Related answers in the prep document are tagged as 【Evidence: ev-*】.
interview.evidencePendingHint: These are kept as follow-up or missing facts, never presented as completed experience.
interview.evidenceUnavailable: Generate interview prep to show the reusable confirmed evidence for this job.
interview.confirmDeleteStoryDraft: Remove this story draft from the current interview prep? It will no longer appear as a pending item.
interview.prepPlaceholder: Add interview round info, known interviewers, key areas to prepare or avoid...
interview.noPrepYetBody: Generate a Markdown prep doc from the JD, LLM report, tailored resume, cv.md, and story bank. Company web research and mock interview mode are reserved for the next phases.

notices.unsavedConfigLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved configuration changes. Leaving or refreshing will discard them. Continue?
notices.unsavedChangesLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leaving or refreshing will discard them. Continue?
notices.addedToPipeline: Added to Pipeline: {{added}} job(s), {{skipped}} duplicate(s) skipped
notices.liveStatusStarted: Job check started. If captcha appears, an interactive browser will open.
notices.llmEvalStarted: LLM evaluation started, report generation may take tens of seconds
notices.resumeSuggestionGenerating: Resume suggestion generation in progress, may take tens of seconds
notices.resumeDraftGenerating: Tailored resume generation in progress, may take tens of seconds
notices.interviewPrepGenerating: Interview prep generation in progress, may take tens of seconds
notices.storyDraftPromoted: Story draft promoted to the story bank
